titlestmt.titleproper: First Congregational Church of Marion records6064
titlestmt.author: Compiled by P.W.

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: First Congregational Church of Marion records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: First Congregational Church of Marion (Marion, N.Y.)

did.abstract: One volume of annual meeting minutes (1808-1829, 1844-1946) and one volume of session minutes (1830-1844) and which include membership lists for this church its predecessor.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: This church was organized in 1808 as the Congregational Church of Williamson. Township boundary changes prompted the new name "First Congregational Church of Marion" by 1825. As a part of the Plan of Union, the church was under the care of the Lyons Presbytery until it fully adopted a Presbyterian governance structure in 1891 when its name changed to "The First Presbyterian Church of Marion." As early as 1835, this church had passed anti-slavery and temperance resolutions making breach of these causes for exclusion from membership.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: The records of The First Presbyterian Church of Marion (1808-1946) are contained in two volumes; item #1 is primarily annual meeting minutes (1808-1829, 1844-1946), and item #2 contains session meeting minutes (1830-1844). Both volumes contain membership and subscription lists, and the articles and covenant of faith. Item #1 is paginated to p. 125, item #2 to p. 70.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on use:
userestrict.p: Information obtained from these records may not be published or otherwise released in such form that any individual mentioned in the records can be identified.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: First Congregational Church of Marion records, #6064. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.corpname: First Presbyterian Church of Marion (Marion, N.Y.)

did.unittitle: Record of the First Presbyterian Church of Marion, N.Y." 1808-1830, 1844-1946

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Item #1. Church meeting book. Includes membership lists. The following are items of note:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Membership list with names, deaths, dismissions (some dates) and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Names of Actual Members." Names, how and when received, remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual meeting minutes begin. Minutes contain a record of pastor and members present, election of deacons, trustees, clerks and sextons, appointments to committees to visit members, examination and admission of new members, communions and baptisms, public confessions, and passage and adoption of resolutions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Confession of faith.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "List of Members at the time of change in Church governance from Congregational to Presbyterian." Names, when and how received, and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Annual meeting minutes continued. These minutes are same as above plus setting salaries, hearing trustees' reports, missions contributions, and no additional disciplinary actions after 1880.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Anti-slavery resolution.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Election and ordination of elders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter (tipped in): from Lyons Presbytery (Newark, N.Y.) to the First Congregational Church of Marion. Gives a copy of minutes where Presbytery recommends the church retain its identity as a Congregational church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A committee of the Presbytery invited to investigate and advise on the church's spiritual welfare.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letter (tipped in): from Lyons Presbytery (E. Palmyra, N.Y.) to the First Congregational Church of Marion. Plan of Union expiration; General Assembly tax; Change of governance.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Eleven added.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Seventeen added.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Change of church governance and title to First Presbyterian Church of Marion; election of elders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Eleven added.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Incorporation of the Society.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Lyons Presbytery meets in Marion; printed program and agenda (tipped in).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 100th anniversary.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Building a new church.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution honoring enlisted men from Marion.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Borrowing up to $1500 from The First National Bank of Marion.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Last entry.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Item #2. Meeting minute book. Items of note:

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Articles of faith; changing governance structure

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Election of elders; covenant and confession of faith.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: "Members when Organized," with dates, names, and remarks.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Session minutes begin. In the minutes are recorded elections of trustees, elders, chairperson, and deacons, examination and admission of new members, dismissions and exclusions, charges, testimonies and decisions made in disciplinary cases, appointments to committees, communions, baptisms, and passage/adoption of resolutions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Delegates appointed to attend a "Consociation" meeting, possibly of the Presbytery.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Resolution to admit only temperant candidates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Temperance resolution adopted.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Antislavery resolution adopted.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Changes in governance and congregation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Last entry of session minutes. At the end of the volume are a subscription list (1843) with names and amounts, and Annual Meeting minutes (Nov. 16, 1833-Nov. 12, 1837, five entries: election of trustees and financial actions).
